title: St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar
tagline: St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar is a much-loved heritage city in Punjab, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. Mary's Cathedral in Jalandhar, Punjab, India, is the seat of the bishop of the Roman Catholic Diocese of Jalandhar. The cathedral is located in the Jalandhar Cantonment. The old church at the same site was dedicated to St.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

nearestAirport.name: Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Jalandhar
topPlaces.description: The Diocese of Jalandhar / Jullundur (Latin: Iullunduren(sis)) is a Latin Catholic diocese of the Catholic Church, located in the city of Jalandhar in the ecclesiastical province of Delhi in India.

topPlaces.name: Jalandhar Cantonment
topPlaces.description: Jalandhar Cantonment (typically abbreviated and referred to as Jalandhar Cantt) is a cantonment town in Jalandhar District in the Indian state of Punjab. It is situated beside the Grand Trunk Road at a distance of 89 km from Amritsar and 371 km from Delhi.

topPlaces.name: Halotali
topPlaces.description: Halotali is a village in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) from district headquarter Jalandhar and 146 kilometres (91 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Sufipind
topPlaces.description: Suffipind is a census town in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Jalandhar, 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Phagwara, 49 kilometres (30 mi) from district headquarter Hoshiarpur and 142 kilometres (88 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Sansarpur
topPlaces.description: Sansarpur is a village in Jalandhar district in the Indian state of Punjab.

topPlaces.name: Aladinpur
topPlaces.description: Aladinpur is a village in Jalandhar - I in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from district headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Dhin
topPlaces.description: Dhin is a census town in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) from Jalandhar, 20 kilometres (12 mi) from Phagwara, 54 kilometres (34 mi) from district headquarter Hoshiarpur and 147 kilometres (91 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Alipur-2
topPlaces.description: Alipur-2 village comes under the Jalandhar East development block of Jalandhar. Jalandhar is a district in the Indian state of Punjab.

items.note: The Diocese of Jalandhar / Jullundur (Latin: Iullunduren(sis)) is a Latin Catholic diocese of the Catholic Church, located in the city of Jalandhar in the ecclesiastical province of Delhi in India.

Sansarpur is a village in Jalandhar district in the Indian state of Punjab.
Aladinpur is a village in Jalandhar - I in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from district headquarter.

Dhin is a census town in Jalandhar district of Punjab State, India. It is located 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) from Jalandhar, 20 kilometres (12 mi) from Phagwara, 54 kilometres (34 mi) from district headquarter Hoshiarpur and 147 kilometres (91 mi) from state capital Chandigarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (47 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Cathedral, Jalandhar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diocese of Jalandhar, Jalandhar Cantonment, Halotali, Sufipind, Sansarpur.
